name: contract-retriever-agentic
description: Agentic Business Knowledge Assistant — NL question → an agent that navigates a knowledge/ tree, reads the real files (CSV/PDF), and returns a grounded, cited answer with a verifiable trace.
//: Every script here is a forcing function. A forcing function is INERT until it is a REQUIRED CI step (.github/workflows/ci.yml). doc-lint + doc-structure-lint are wired real; the agent engine + its gates live in backend/ (Python) and are run by test:agent (validator) + eval:agent (the repeated-N golden eval harness).

scripts.verify:release: npm run doc-lint && npm run doc-structure-lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:agent
